methods.description: This method involves grouping 16S rRNA gene clone sequences into taxonomic units to evaluate taxon-environment associations within Cell counts Profiling of Woeseiales assemblages.

steps.description: Download from the SILVA SSUref database an alignment of the near full length 16S rRNA gene clone sequences assigned to JTB255-MBG.
steps.searchable_summary: download 16S rRNA gene clone sequences from SILVA SSUref database

steps.description: Filter out sequences with homopolymeric regions of eight or more nucleotides, resulting in a set of 994 sequences.
Calculate uncorrected pairwise distances between the 994 clone sequences remaining in the alignment.
Apply hierarchical furthest-neighbor clustering at 96% sequence identity using mothur v1.37.6 to produce a total of 171 phylotypes.
Pick one sequence per phylotype for subsequent phylogenetic analyses.
Retrieve descriptions of the environmental origin of the sequences within each phylotype and lineage from SILVA by parsing the attributes 'isolation source' and 'reference title'.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve environmental origin descriptions from SILVA

steps.description: Classify the sampling sites of 933 clone sequences into one of the three environmental categories: deep-sea, coastal, or continental.
steps.searchable_summary: classify sampling sites into environmental categories

steps.description: Perform a correspondence analysis (CA) of an environment × phylotype matrix to investigate associations between phylotypes and environmental categories.
steps.searchable_summary: perform correspondence analysis on environment-phylotype matrix

methods.description: This method compares the composition of Woeseiales bacteria assemblages in deep-sea and coastal environments and evaluates the evolutionary placement of oligotypes.

steps.description: Group the 16S amplicon sequences into oligotypes for higher taxonomic resolution.
Evaluate the evolutionary placement of the Woeseiales oligotypes using the evolutionary placement algorithm implemented in RAxML v8.2.X.
Assign the oligotypes to the phylotypes and lineages defined based on near full-length 16S rRNA gene sequences.
steps.searchable_summary: assign oligotypes to phylotypes and lineages
